rows.notes: Added missing row '1771' from gpt-5-mini. Clearly visible as a header/year at the top left margin of the ledger. gemini-flash missed this.

rows.description: Allowed to Mr. Colliss Ld. Tax: Milit: & Langables
rows.notes: Monetary values agreed by consensus. Description combined from both extractors based on visual verification: 'Colliss' from gemini-flash, 'Ld. Tax' from gemini-flash (preferred over 'Lett. Tax' from gpt-5-mini), 'Langables' from gpt-5-mini (preferred over 'longables' from gemini-flash).

rows.english_description_with_amount: Allowance made to Mr. Colliss for Land Tax, Militia Tax, and Langables, amounting to £7 16s 4d.

rows.description: 26 To Mr. Walsh for stamp &c as Publ: Notary - on vacancy of Pastorship
rows.notes: Monetary values agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which correctly identified and included the sub-note 'on vacancy of Pastorship' that gpt-5-mini missed. Visually confirmed.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr. Walsh, a public notary, for stamps and other services related to the vacancy of a pastorship, amounting to £0 12s 0d.

rows.description: Decr. 28 To the Biblect of Michells Benefaction -
rows.notes: Monetary values agreed by consensus. Description combined: 'Decr.' and 'Biblect' from gemini-flash. 'Michells' (no apostrophe) confirmed visually against both (gpt-5-mini also had no apostrophe). gpt-5-mini's note about ambiguity in 'Bidlect' was helpful but visually resolved to 'Biblect'.
rows.english_description: Payment to the librarian from Michell's Benefaction.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the librarian from Michell's Benefaction, amounting to £2 2s 0d.

rows.description: 1772 Jan: 3. To Mr. Bolton, Plumber -

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr. Bolton, the plumber, amounting to £23 1s 0d.

rows.description: July 20 Paid to Dr. Hennicott for his House -
rows.notes: Monetary values agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which correctly transcribed the name 'Hennicott' and included the trailing hyphen. gemini-flash's note regarding the calligraphic flourish for zero pence is also accurate and helpful. gpt-5-mini's uncertainty note was helpful, but visually resolved to 'Hennicott'.

rows.description: { To Mr. Thomson for surveying getting. the House
rows.notes: Description and monetary values from gemini-flash. gemini-flash correctly identified the braced opening and the monetary values (1 pound 1 shilling). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the amount as 1 shilling, misinterpreted 'getting.' as '& setting', and misplaced the '22-' date into this description which belongs to the subsequent entry. Visually confirmed.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr. Thomson for surveying the house.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr. Thomson for surveying the house, amounting to £1 1s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the City Reviewers, amounting to £1 1s 0d.
